title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at L&T Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at L&T Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, L&T Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
